hero.title: PDF to XLSX
hero.subtitle: Turn PDF tables into editable Excel spreadsheets.

features.title: Table extraction
features.text: Detects and exports tables to sheets.

how_to_use: Select table areas or use automatic detection.
about_formats: PDF often contains tables and reports.
XLSX stores tabular data in spreadsheets for analysis.
common_problems: Complex table layouts may not map perfectly
tips: Crop to the table area for better extraction

faq.question: Will it extract multiple tables?
faq.answer: Yes, we attempt to detect multiple tables and export them into a single workbook.
